Telecommunications Case

Thermal Baseplate and End Cover Machining for Telecommunications

thermal baseplate / end cover / module assembly

IndustriesTelecommunications
Part Functionthermal baseplate / end cover / module assembly
Manufacturing Capabilitiesaluminum CNC machining, flatness control, surface finishing and dimensional inspection

Project Scenario

The module project paired a thermal baseplate with end cover parts, requiring machining references and finishing requirements to stay aligned.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivery supported module assembly, heat-path review and fit checking.
